description_long: This is a shallow, round ceramic plate with a slightly irregular rim and a matte white finish. The plate contains a serving of raw salmon fillet, centrally placed atop a bed of chopped green vegetables, likely Brussels sprouts or similar. The exterior of the plate features some black markings or stains, giving it a slightly rustic or handmade appearance. The interior is smooth and clean, with the food contents clearly visible and contrasting against the white ceramic. The plate appears sturdy and thick-walled, suitable for serving main courses or salads. There are no visible handles or decorative patterns aside from the black marks on the exterior.
description: A white, round ceramic plate with black exterior markings, holding a piece of raw salmon on chopped green vegetables.
description_view_0: Side view showing the plate's shallow depth, black exterior markings, and the salmon fillet on green vegetables.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the central placement of the salmon and the full spread of green vegetables inside the plate.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the plate's rim and the food contents, less black marking visible.
description_view_3: Another top-down angle, focusing on the salmon and vegetables, with minimal exterior markings visible.
attribute_visibility_of_markings_or_insc: Black markings are visible on the exterior lower rim of the plate; no inscriptions or logos are present.
attribute_surrounding_context: The plate is filled with food, suggesting it is intended for serving or dining use.
